title: PVP CROSSHAIR V2
body:
PVP CROSSHAIR  v2


Texture pack with a custom crosshair for the minecraft pvp pro.

With this sight you can improve in combat, since it does not get in the way and provides precision.


Contains:

    - Custom Crosshair


  By @d_de_diego_d

______________________________________________________________________________________________________


Pack de texturas con una mira customizada para el pro pvp de minecraft.

Con esta mira podras mejorar en el combate, ya que no estorba y aporta precision.



Contiene:

      - Mira customizada

By @d_de_diego_d
